cards.back: A framework that combines Human Values, Human Capabilities, and Human-Technology Interaction to design trustworthy and reliable AI systems.
An AI system that consistently performs as intended, without errors, and meets user expectations.
An AI system that minimizes harm to individuals, communities, and society, and aligns with human values and principles.
An AI system that provides transparent, explainable, and fair decision-making, and builds trust with its users.
Principles and rules that guide the design of AI systems to ensure they are reliable, safe, and trustworthy, and meet human needs and values.
